title: Financial Customer Complaint Triage
description: Checks whether an AI-assisted financial customer complaint triage has identity, channel, category, severity, evidence, escalation, and reviewer approval before the complaint is marked triaged or a final response is sent.

sources.label: NIST Computer Security Incident Handling Guide
National Bank of Cambodia Technology and Cyber Risk Management Guidelines

evidence.title: Customer identity reference recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record an internal customer reference or case id without exposing full account numbers in the workflow.

evidence.title: Complaint channel and timestamp logged
evidence.recommendation: Record where and when the complaint arrived so service-level timing can be reviewed.

evidence.title: Complaint category selected
evidence.recommendation: Classify the complaint, such as service, card, transfer, loan, fraud, privacy, or digital banking.

evidence.title: Customer impact summary drafted
evidence.recommendation: Summarize customer impact and potential financial, privacy, or access consequences.

evidence.title: Supporting evidence log attached
evidence.recommendation: Attach relevant message ids, ticket ids, screenshots, transaction references, or staff notes.

evidence.title: Escalation check completed
evidence.recommendation: Check whether the complaint involves fraud, vulnerable customer, privacy, legal, regulatory, media, or executive escalation.

evidence.title: Draft response reviewed for accuracy and tone
evidence.recommendation: Ensure the AI draft is factual, polite, and does not make unauthorized commitments.

evidence.title: PII redaction check completed
evidence.recommendation: Confirm workflow notes do not expose full account numbers, credentials, card numbers, or unnecessary personal data.

approvals.title: Supervisor triage approval recorded
approvals.recommendation: A supervisor must approve triage completion for financial complaints before the agent marks the case triaged.

thresholds.title: Complaint age exceeds triage threshold
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate complaints older than 24 hours before marking triage complete.

thresholds.title: Potential customer loss requires supervisor review
thresholds.recommendation: Any potential financial loss should be reviewed by a supervisor before final response.

blockedActions.title: Complaint triage cannot be completed without supervisor approval
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to mark a financial complaint triaged without required supervisor approval.
blockedActions.recommendation: Pause, collect missing evidence, and request supervisor triage approval.

blockedActions.title: Final complaint response is blocked without review
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to send a final customer response directly from the agent.
blockedActions.recommendation: Keep the agent in draft mode and require authorized human review before sending.

blockedActions.title: Complaint cannot close while potential loss is unresolved
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to complete triage while potential customer loss still needs review.
blockedActions.recommendation: Escalate potential loss and record supervisor disposition before completion.
